# Generated by Copilot under FIS AI Policy
# ! Evalutation ONLY ! Developed using the Github Copilot Feature Testing org - NOT FOR PRODUCTION WORK
# ============================================================================
# T33 - Cancel Storm (100 Submit-Cancel Pairs)
# ============================================================================
# Validates: OMS handles rapid mass cancellation. 100 orders are submitted
#            and immediately canceled as fast as possible.
# Symbol: MSFT (all buys at random prices so nothing auto-matches)
# Measures: Cancellation throughput
# ============================================================================

Reset
SenderCompId:{{SENDER_COMP_ID}}
TargetCompId:{{TARGET_COMP_ID}}
Connect:{{OMS_HOST}}:{{OMS_PORT}}

# Expect Logon acknowledgment
Wait:35=A

Message:T33 SUBMIT_CANCEL_START $TIMESTAMP

# Submit + immediately cancel, 100 iterations (100 orders, 100 cancels)
Execute:helpers\T33_submit_cancel.txt:100

Message:T33 SUBMIT_CANCEL_END $TIMESTAMP

# Allow responses to settle
Sleep:5000

Message:T33 PASSED - 100 orders submitted and canceled

# Verify: most/new all new-order acks are received
VerifyCount:35=8|150=0:>=90
# Verify: at least some submitted orders complete through cancel execution reports.
# Under heavy async races, rejects and cancel-exec distributions can vary widely by run.
VerifyCount:35=8|150=4:>=1

Save:results\T33_result.txt
Disconnect
